message.content:
[
  {
    "title": "German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 2018",
    "url": "https://search.gesis.org/en/dataset/ZA5274",
    "description": "ALLBUS surveys political attitudes and behavior in Germany; 2018 wave includes topics relevant to political behavior and attitudes.",
    "country": "Germany",
    "category": "Political behaviour and attitudes"
  },
  {
    "title": "German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) Rolling Cross-Section, 2017",
    "url": "https://search.gesis.org/en/dataset/ZA6801",
    "description": "Election study on political behavior and attitudes in Germany during the 2017 federal election campaign.",
    "country": "Germany",
    "category": "Political behaviour and attitudes"
  },
  {
    "title": "GLES Post-Election Cross-Section, 2021",
    "url": "https://search.gesis.org/en/dataset/ZA7701",
    "description": "Post-election survey measuring political attitudes and voting behavior in Germany after the 2021 federal election.",
    "country": "Germany",
    "category": "Political behaviour and attitudes"
  },
  {
    "title": "ISSP 2017: Role of Government IV (Germany)",
    "url": "https://search.gesis.org/en/dataset/ZA6900",
    "description": "International Social Survey Programme module on the role of government with German data, including law and order and public safety.",
    "country": "Germany",
    "category": "International politics and organisations"
  },
  {
    "title": "ISSP 2014: Citizenship (Germany)",
    "url": "https://search.gesis.org/en/dataset/ZA6670",
    "description": "ISSP module focusing on citizenship, rights, and duties with German sample; relevant to political attitudes and international perspectives.",
    "country": "Germany",
    "category": "International politics and organisations"
  },
  {
    "title": "German Peace Report Survey 2018",
    "url": "https://search.gesis.org/en/dataset/ZA7485",
    "description": "Survey on conflict, security, and peace issues in Germany, assessing public attitudes toward peace and security policies.",
    "country": "Germany",
    "category": "Conflict, security and peace"
  },
  {
    "title": "Politbarometer 2022",
    "url": "https://search.gesis.org/en/dataset/ZA7704",
    "description": "Regular tracking survey of political opinions and attitudes in Germany, including party support and policy views.",
    "country": "Germany",
    "category": "Political behaviour and attitudes"
  },
  {
    "title": "ISSP 2013: National Identity III (Germany)",
    "url": "https://search.gesis.org/en/dataset/ZA5950",
    "description": "German data from ISSP National Identity module, addressing international identity and attitudes relevant to politics.",
    "country": "Germany",
    "category": "International politics and organisations"
  },
  {
    "title": "German Election Study 2013: Campaign Panel",
    "url": "https://search.gesis.org/en/dataset/ZA5705",
    "description": "Panel study across the 2013 campaign measuring political attitudes, participation, and vote intentions in Germany.",
    "country": "Germany",
    "category": "Political behaviour and attitudes"
  },
  {
    "title": "ISSP 2018: Religion IV (Germany)",
    "url": "https://search.gesis.org/en/dataset/ZA7573",
    "description": "German data from ISSP Religion module, including items linked to social cohesion and conflict dimensions.",
    "country": "Germany",
    "category": "Conflict, security and peace"
  }
]
